safety.disclaimer: Research scanner only. Not financial advice. No live trading.

wait_for_pullback: good score but price too extended above VWAP
alert_only: interesting setup but missing at least one key confirmation
no_trade: blocked by risk, data, price, volume, trend, or score rules

sec_enrichment.rule: SEC can penalize/block risky filings and provide catalyst context, but cannot trigger buys by itself.
